prestazioni: B18D (B18D-1007) 1.8L inline-4 engine swap with forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons (11.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Paired with a custom camshaft grind by Schrick (284° duration, 11.5mm lift) for high-RPM power delivery (8,500 RPM redline).

Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Stainless Works, feeding into a 3.5-inch straight-pipe exhaust with a MagnaFlow 10416 muffler for aggressive tone without drone. Intercooled with a custom air-to-water setup using a PWR radiator and Bosch 044 fuel pump for consistent boost (18 psi peak).

Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom wiring harness by Painless Performance, controlling sequential fuel injection via ID1000x injectors and a custom-mapped ignition system using MSD 6AL-2 CDI and NGK R7437-9 racing plugs. Chassis-specific traction control via a Motec C125 dash with Bosch 0261230046 ABS sensors for retrofitted stability management.
estetica: Full carbon fiber body conversion using a custom PV544-specific kit by Volante Designs (Italy), including a 3-piece front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling. Painted in Volvo’s original ‘Sport’ color (Amazon Blue, code 420) with a matte clear coat by PPG.

OEM+ interior overhaul with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (retrimmed in Volvo’s original ‘Sport’ red leather by Saddleback Leather Co.), a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, bolt-in design with harness bar), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub. Retains the original PV544 dashboard but with a digital gauge cluster by Defi (BF series) for boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR.

Suspension overhaul with a custom coilover setup by Öhlins (DFV Road & Track, PV544-specific valving) paired with polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (SPF0115K) and a 2-inch drop. Wheels: 15x8 ET0 BBS RS-GT (gold) with 195/50R15 Toyo R888R tires, mounted on custom hub adapters by TrakMotive for modern brake clearance (Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers with 11-inch rotors).
